provider: HKU School of Future Media BA(GCIN) Regulations and Syllabuses
note: The official 2026-27 syllabus applies to candidates admitted in 2026-27 and thereafter and is labelled Pending approval. This supplement records 98 unique coded courses: 20 explicitly named artificial-intelligence-literacy and language-enhancement requirements, 8 Major core/capstone courses, and 70 unique interdisciplinary advanced electives. The Major requires five advanced electives within Years 2-4, with at least three courses (18 credits) from the same concentration; courses listed in more than one concentration count toward one concentration only. Advanced electives do not receive a single recommended Year or Semester because the official syllabus gives only the Years 2-4 range, and the School states that not all courses are offered every semester or annually. GCIN2105 is cross-listed as MUSI2079 and is stored once under its primary published code. SOCI2055 and GLAS2101 are each stored once with both official concentration roles retained in group text. The open Common Core Curriculum, 108-credit free-elective pool, introductory course offered by any Arts or Social Sciences programme, other open Level 900 AILT alternatives, unspecified Chinese-language substitutes, and additional prerequisite courses are not expanded into fabricated closed lists.
